# Copilot Repository Instructions

## Startup Context
- At the start of each task in this repository, read [AGENTS.md](../AGENTS.md) before making changes.
- Treat AGENTS.md as the repository context baseline for structure, conventions, and operational assumptions.

## Priority Rules
- User instructions in chat take highest priority.
- Then follow this file.
- Then use AGENTS.md as project context.

## Maintenance
- If a change makes AGENTS.md stale, update AGENTS.md in the same task.
- Keep AGENTS.md concise and operational.
